violations.text: The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the sandwich refrigerator and bunker have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The chest freezer has an accumulation of frost and debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
The doors to the toilet rooms are not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
The dumpster enclosure has an accumulation of trash, litter, and unused items such as pallets. The dumpster enclosure must be maintained clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the unused deli area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

The ledge along the front window area has an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

The area outside along the back of the building have an accumulation of trash. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the toilet room beneath the kitchen.. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
The hand-washing sink in the toilet room beneath the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

The deli area has open, outdated, and expired food. Per PIC the deli area has been closed since the FMC quit weeks ago. All open, outdated and expired food must be disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2026

A salad containing chicken was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit in the bunker known to have temperature control issues. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. Foods requiring refrigeration are not to be stored in the bunker. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2026

Food observed stored on the floor in the market, on shelves less than 6 inches above the floor, and hanging from racks with the food hanging down less than 6 inches from the floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
The Red Bull refrigerator was not in good repair, taped. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the chest freezers have an accumulation of frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator, bunker, and shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. . New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
The door to the toilet rooms are not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
The receptacles in the toilet rooms is lacking covers. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
Toilet rooms are dirty and need to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
The dumpster enclosure has an accumulation of trash, litter, and unused items such as pallets. Dumpster enclosure must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed throughout establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

The ledge along the front window has an accumulation of soil residue, dead insects, debris, and trash. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

The outside area along the back of the building has an accumulation of unused items and trash. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

Sandwiches packaged in the food establishment are complete lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Sandwiches were placed in the deli display case. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings on the floor inside the kitchen cabinets. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
The hand-washing sink in the toilet room on the market side was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

The toilet room on the deli side of the basement is lacking proper signage. A sign or poster reminding food employees to wash their hands is required at all hand washing sinks used by food employees. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer must be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

Cheese, and cheese snack packs observed held at 55-56 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

Slice meats observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

Sandwiches and salads packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Foods were removed from the self-service refrigerator and placed in the deli case. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

The presence of rodens is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings on the floor inside the kitchen cabinets. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the prep sink, slicer, and deli case have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The non-food contact surfaces of the ice cream chest freezer have an accumulation of frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

The floors throughout the facility including the stairs have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen and basement areas. The establishment shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the kitchen. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
